name: Loan for Any Purpose
description_short: Loan For Any Purpose at 3968 Main St unit 101, Kansas City, MO 64111 in the Old Westport neighborhood is Mon-Fri 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 11 reviews. Call +1 816-357-8975.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose is a consumer lending company with at least two physical locations in the United States — one in Detroit, Michigan and one in Atlanta, Georgia. The Detroit branch is located at 3403 Grand River Ave #200 and operates seven days a week with extended weekday hours (Monday through Friday, 7am–8pm) and weekend availability (Saturday and Sunday, 9am–6pm), making it accessible to borrowers who cannot visit a lender during traditional business hours. The Atlanta location uses a separate phone number, indicating at minimum a two-location operation.

Loan For Any Purpose offers a broad product menu designed to serve borrowers across the credit spectrum and funding timeline. For small, urgent needs, the company provides cash advances and payday loans for amounts under $1,000, along with same-day loans that promise fast approval with minimal documentation. For mid-range needs, installment loans are available from $1,000 to $5,000. For larger amounts, personal loans and bad credit loans extend up to $50,000, and title loans — secured against a vehicle's title — also reach up to $50,000. All products except the personal loan explicitly welcome all credit types, including borrowers with damaged histories. The personal loan product carries a note that a 'higher credit score is recommended,' distinguishing it from the rest of the portfolio.

One notable feature is the company's application process: submitting an inquiry does not affect the applicant's FICO score. Rather than a hard pull with traditional credit bureaus, Loan For Any Purpose uses a non-traditional consumer reporting agency during its review. While this type of inquiry may appear on that agency's profile, it does not impact a FICO score — a meaningful benefit for rate-shopping borrowers. The combination of extended hours, weekend service, and in-person locations also distinguishes it from fully online lenders.

Loan For Any Purpose fills a real need for credit-challenged or time-pressed borrowers, but it has a significant transparency gap: no APRs, interest rates, or fee schedules are published on the website. Borrowers cannot assess the cost of a loan before applying. The company's own disclaimer acknowledges that its products are designed for short-term financial needs and are 'not intended as a long-term borrowing solution,' and recommends that borrowers with ongoing credit difficulties seek certified credit counseling. This is standard language for high-cost lending products and should be treated as a meaningful signal to request and compare specific rate terms carefully before signing.
address: 3968 Main St unit 101, Kansas City, MO 64111

company_info.headquarters: 3968 Main St unit 101, Kansas City, MO 64111

pros: All credit types accepted for most products including payday loans, installment loans, title loans, and bad credit loans
Applying does not impact FICO score — uses non-traditional consumer reporting agency instead of hard bureau pull
Extended weekday hours (7am–8pm Mon–Fri) and full weekend service (9am–6pm Sat–Sun)
Wide loan range from $250 to $50,000 covers both small emergency needs and larger borrowing
Same-day loan option with fast approval and minimum documents required
Multiple product types under one roof — no need to visit separate lenders for different needs
Physical in-person locations in Detroit and Atlanta for borrowers who prefer face-to-face service
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information published on the website — cost of borrowing is unknown before applying
Personal loans (the largest amounts, up to $50,000) require a higher credit score, excluding bad-credit borrowers from the best terms
Products are explicitly described as short-term solutions only, not suitable for ongoing financial needs
Non-traditional credit inquiry may still appear on alternative consumer reporting agency profiles
Loan availability, rates, and terms vary by state, adding uncertainty for out-of-area applicants
best_for: Borrowers with bad or limited credit history needing quick access to $250–$5,000
Vehicle owners in Michigan or Georgia seeking a secured title loan up to $50,000
Workers with non-traditional schedules who need weekend or early-morning lender access
Applicants who want to explore loan options without triggering a hard FICO credit inquiry
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for credit-challenged borrowers in Detroit or Atlanta who need fast cash — from small payday-style advances to vehicle-secured title loans up to $50,000 — and want to apply without a hard FICO inquiry. The main caveat is a complete absence of disclosed rates or APRs on the website, making it impossible to evaluate the true cost of borrowing before submitting an application.
services: Cash advances (under $1,000, all credit types, unsecured)
Same-day loans (fast approval, minimal documentation, all credit types)
Title loans (secured by vehicle title, up to $50,000, all credit types)
Payday loans (up to $1,000, all credit types)
Bad credit loans ($250–$50,000, all credit types)
Installment loans ($1,000–$5,000, all credit types, unsecured)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, higher credit score recommended, unsecured)
In-person loan applications at Detroit and Atlanta branches
Soft-pull application process (no FICO score impact)
